# Arbor Care Tree Solutions

> ISA-Certified arborists providing professional tree services throughout Denver, CO and the surrounding metro area.

Arbor Care Tree Solutions is a family-owned, licensed and insured tree service company based at 1130 S Santa Fe Dr, Denver, CO 80223. Led by ISA-Certified Arborist Thomas Fraser with 30 years of experience, the company offers tree removal, emergency tree removal, tree trimming and pruning, stump grinding and removal, arborist and tree-health services, firewood sales and delivery, and seasonal landscaping across Denver and nearby cities. Free estimates, no trip charge, and 24/7 emergency response.

## Pages

- [Home](https://arborcaretreesolutions.com/): Overview of tree services in Denver, CO
- [Tree Services](https://arborcaretreesolutions.com/tree-services/): Complete list of services offered
- [Tree Removal](https://arborcaretreesolutions.com/tree-removal/): Standard, hazardous, and emergency tree removal
- [Tree Trimming & Pruning](https://arborcaretreesolutions.com/tree-trimming/): ISA-certified trimming and pruning
- [Stump Grinding](https://arborcaretreesolutions.com/stump-grinding-denver-co/): Below-grade stump grinding
- [Arborist Services](https://arborcaretreesolutions.com/arborist-service-denver-co/): Tree health assessments and treatment
- [Firewood Supplier](https://arborcaretreesolutions.com/firewood-supplier-denver-co/): Seasoned hardwood for sale and delivery
- [Our Work](https://arborcaretreesolutions.com/our-work/): Project photos across Denver
- [Testimonials](https://arborcaretreesolutions.com/testimonials/): Customer reviews
- [About](https://arborcaretreesolutions.com/about-arbor-care-index/): Background on the team and Thomas Fraser
- [Contact](https://arborcaretreesolutions.com/contact-us/): Contact details and free estimate requests

## Service Areas

Denver, Aurora, Lakewood, Englewood, Littleton, Centennial, Highlands Ranch, Arvada, Westminster, and Thornton — all in Colorado.

## Contact

- Phone: (303) 949-6818
- Address: 1130 S Santa Fe Dr, Denver, CO 80223
